mapper.select: select id, title, duration_minutes, status, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted from course_chapters where id = #{id} and deleted = false
select id, title, duration_minutes, status, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted from course_chapters where course_id = #{courseId} and deleted = false order by id asc
mapper.insert: insert into course_chapters (course_id, title, duration_minutes, status, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted) values (#{courseId}, #{entity.title}, #{entity.durationMinutes}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.createdAt}, #{entity.updatedAt}, #{entity.createdBy}, #{entity.updatedBy}, #{entity.deleted})
mapper.update: update course_chapters set course_id = #{courseId}, title = #{entity.title}, duration_minutes = #{entity.durationMinutes}, status = #{entity.status}, updated_at = #{entity.updatedAt}, updated_by = #{entity.updatedBy}, deleted = #{entity.deleted} where id = #{entity.id} and deleted = false
